verses.1: How beautiful are your feet in sandals, prince’s daughter!
verses.2: Your body is like a round goblet,
verses.3: Your two breasts are like two fawns,
verses.4: Your neck is like an ivory tower.
verses.5: Your head on you is like Carmel.
verses.6: How beautiful and how pleasant you are,
verses.7: This, your stature, is like a palm tree,
verses.8: I said, “I will climb up into the palm tree.
verses.9: Your mouth is like the best wine,
verses.11: Come, my beloved! Let’s go out into the field.
verses.12: Let’s go early up to the vineyards.
